artifact_meta.normalization_note: artifact_meta was added during the normalization pass and is not part of the original experiment output; this file is canonical for the matched Phase I RBM and Autoencoder accuracy, AUC, FPR, and matched-run deltas, notebook 18 hardcodes latent dimension 16 for the classical models beyond what phase1_locked.yaml specifies, and sha256_short is retained as the pre-normalization payload hash.
